name: Bug Emergency
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光虫異変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バグ・エマージェンシー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 2 Level 3 Insect-Type monsters in your Graveyard; Special Summon them, but their effects are negated. You can banish this card and 1 Xyz Monster from your Graveyard; the Levels of all Level 3 Insect-Type monsters you currently control become equal to the banished monster's Rank until the end of this turn, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Insect-Type monsters. You can only activate 1 "Bug Emergency" per turn.
eff: Target 2 Level 3 Insect-Type monsters in your Graveyard; Special Summon them, but their effects are negated. You can banish this card and 1 Xyz Monster from your Graveyard; the Levels of all Level 3 Insect-Type monsters you currently control become equal to the banished monster's Rank until the end of this turn, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Insect-Type monsters. You can only activate 1 "Bug Emergency" per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
